# Same Day JetWash
> Professional pressure washing services across Surrey, UK

## Services
- Driveway cleaning
- Patio cleaning
- Block paving cleaning & sealing
- Render cleaning (soft washing)
- Decking cleaning
- Commercial jetwashing
- Roof cleaning
- Gutter cleaning
- Soft washing

## Tools
- Cost Calculator: /calculator — Free instant pressure washing cost estimator. Calculates prices based on surface type, area size, condition, and optional extras like sealing and moss removal. Based on UK 2026 market rates.

## Service Areas
Reigate, Redhill, Horley, Crawley, Epsom, Banstead, Caterham, Oxted, Leatherhead, Dorking, Merstham, Earlswood, Salfords, Nutfield, Chipstead, Godstone, Betchworth

## Coverage
20-mile radius from RH1 (Redhill, Surrey). All RH postcodes (RH1-RH11), SM7, CR3, KT17-KT24.

- Roof Cleaning Cost UK: /guides/roof-cleaning-cost-uk — Complete roof moss removal pricing, soft washing vs pressure washing, biocide treatments, and safety requirements
